# This file was automatically generated by the gun_demo script.
# It is the launch computer generator for the bullet and is run separately.

script_variables
  Map<double, double> RangeVelMap = Map<double, double>();
end_script_variables
include BULLET.txt

platform_type MYWEAP BULLET
   processor StoreRangeVelInfo WSF_SCRIPT_PROCESSOR
      script_variables
         extern Map<double, double> RangeVelMap;
      end_script_variables
      update_interval 0.01 seconds
      on_update
         RangeVelMap.Set(PLATFORM.GroundRangeTo(0,0,0), ((MUZZLE_VELOCITY_MS + PLATFORM.Speed()) / 2));
      end_on_update
   end_processor
end_platform_type

weapon MYWEAP WSF_EXPLICIT_WEAPON
   launched_platform_type    MYWEAP
   weapon_effects            BULLET_LETHALITY
   quantity                  1
   firing_delay              0 secs
   launch_delta_v            1021 0 0 m/s
end_weapon

platform LAUNCH_PLATFORM WSF_PLATFORM
   side red
   add weapon myweap MYWEAP
      firing_delay 0.0 sec
      tilt 0.0 degrees
   end_weapon
   position 0n 0e altitude 500 m
   add processor fire_once WSF_SCRIPT_PROCESSOR
      execute at_time 0.000001 sec absolute
         WsfWeapon weapon = PLATFORM.Weapon("myweap");
         weapon.Fire();
         PROCESSOR.TurnOff();
      end_execute
   end_processor
end_platform

#event_pipe
   #file BULLET_replay.aer
#end_event_pipe
